rationale: Educ. Code §12.055 governs applicability of laws to campus charter schools and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A campus or program for which a charter is granted under this subchapter is subject to federal and state laws and rules governing public schools
_note: Rule text concerns charter school applicability of education laws; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
